  "executive_summary": "Integration architecture for a logistics platform connecting three external systems (SAP ERP via SFTP/XML, DHL Carrier API via REST/webhooks, Analytics via Kafka) using an event-driven backbone with dedicated Anti-Corruption Layers per integration.
